allow: PowerShell($file = "C:\\Users\\HaniAlassiriAlhabbou\\git\\Semantic_Boxels\\SEMANTIC_AUDIT_2026-04-28.md"; $lines = Get-Content -LiteralPath $file; "Total lines: $\($lines.Count\)"; "Last 8 lines:"; $lines | Select-Object -Last 8 | ForEach-Object { $i = [array]::IndexOf\($lines, $_\) + 1; "$i`: $_" })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "eval_results\\sweep_2026-05-10_uc-false"\) { Get-ChildItem "eval_results\\sweep_2026-05-10_uc-false" | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count; Write-Host "Latest mtime in sweep dir:"; \(Get-ChildItem "eval_results\\sweep_2026-05-10_uc-false" -Recurse | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1\).LastWriteTime } else { Write-Host "No sweep dir found" })

PowerShell($tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP "boxels_wiki_$\(Get-Random\)"; git clone https://git.rwth-aachen.de/hani.alassiri.alhabboub/pybullet.wiki.git $tmp 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; Set-Location $tmp; "WIKI_PATH=$tmp")

PowerShell($latest = Get-ChildItem eval_results/ -Directory | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "Latest sweep: $\($latest.Name\)"; Get-ChildItem $latest.FullName | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; if \(Test-Path \(Join-Path $latest.FullName "cells"\)\) { $cells = Get-ChildItem \(Join-Path $latest.FullName "cells"\) -Directory; Write-Output "Cells: $\($cells.Count\)"; $done = $cells | Where-Object { Test-Path \(Join-Path $_.FullName 'timing_summary.json'\) }; Write-Output "With summary: $\($done.Count\)" })
